arts.ttl: AC Milan vs. Roma to finish the year in style
arts.sum: AC Milan are unbeaten in each of their last nine Serie A matches against Roma (W6 D3), scoring an average of 2.2 goals per game; the Giallorossi`s last win against the Rossoneri in the competition was back in October 2019 (2-1). AC Milan have scored in 13 consecutive Serie A games against Roma for the first time in their history; on the other hand, the Giallorossi have scored in each of their last eight league matches against the Rossoneri, their longest such run since 2009 (run of nine).

arts.ttl: Roma considering Saelemaekers-Cristante swap with Milan
arts.sum: Alexis Saelemaekers has made a strong impression on Roma's management, prompting the club to consider retaining the Belgian winger for future seasons. However, Milan is closely monitoring the player's growth, especially after his return from injury, during which he has regained his top form. The post Roma considering Saelemaekers-Cristante swap with Milan appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan pursue Kolo Muani from Paris Saint-Germain
arts.sum: AC Milan are seeking to strengthen their squad ahead of the January transfer window, with a particular focus on acquiring a new striker. The club are aiming to enhance the options available to head coach Paulo Fonseca, targeting not only a forward but also a central midfielder and a full-back. The post Milan pursue Kolo Muani from Paris Saint-Germain appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Pulisic suffers injury setback, will miss Roma clash
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic, AC Milan's leading scorer, is out of Sunday's Serie A clash against Roma after a setback during his recovery, coach Paulo Fonseca said.
